title: mentha aquatica var. pusilla
intro: Mentha aquatica var. pusilla, also known as dwarf water mint or small water mint, is a compact, fragrant perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to alleviate digestive issues and relieve symptoms of respiratory infections due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. pusilla include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
